---
applyTo: '**/*'
description: 'Security and authentication rules'
---

# Security guidelines

## Context loading
- Security architecture docs
- Identity ADRs

## Deterministic requirements
- Entra ID authentication required
- Bearer tokens for APIs and MCP
- No secrets in code or markdown
- Least privilege enforced

## Structured output
- Threat considerations documented
- Authentication verified
- Security review checklist completed
